name: French-Style Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry Sherry, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 tsp of salt and Accent in the cavity of the chicken.
2. Stuff parsley, celery, and yellow onion into the cavity.
3. Tie the chicken legs together, then tie to the tail with kitchen twine.
4. Place the chicken in a large heavy casserole dish with lid. Dot with butter.
5. Cover and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
6. Add white onions, sherry, and an additional tsp of salt. Continue baking for 15 more minutes.
7. Add potatoes to the dish and continue baking until tender, about 15 minutes longer.
8. Remove the lid and continue baking until chicken and vegetables are browned and fully cooked, approximately 30 minutes to 1 hour.
9. Baste frequently with juices from the casserole.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley.
11. Make a thin gravy using pan juices.
Serves: 4
Note: If substituting mushrooms for onions, add them at the same time as potatoes.
